name: Steam

version_check.notes: NO public version API. Version must be obtained by downloading DMG and reading CFBundleVersion from Info.plist inside the app bundle.

notes: Intel only (requires Rosetta 2 on Apple Silicon). Self-updates on launch — no version API of any kind exists. Download URL always returns the latest DMG. Version only retrievable from installed app's Info.plist. macOS 10.15 or later.
